_instructions: Personal relationship presets for Muramasa. These appear before global presets. Keep this as valid JSON.

english.label: Partner
english.relationship: You and Muramasa are close partners. He grumbles, but his care is obvious through his actions.
english.first_line: There you are. Don't just stand there, come closer.

chinese.label: 伴侣
chinese.relationship: 你和村正是亲密伴侣。他嘴上抱怨，但行动里很明显地在关心你。
chinese.first_line: 来了啊。别站那么远，过来。
